parameters.name: tripID
parameters.description: ID of the trip to retrieve details for.

parameters.name: serviceDate
parameters.description: Service date for the trip as Unix time in milliseconds (optional).

parameters.name: includeTrip
parameters.description: Whether to include the full trip element in the references section (defaults to true).

parameters.name: includeSchedule
parameters.description: Whether to include the full schedule element in the tripDetails section (defaults to true).

parameters.name: includeStatus
parameters.description: Whether to include the full status element in the tripDetails section (defaults to true).

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time parameter to query the system at a specific time (optional).
